title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: UMPQUA HEALTH ALLIANCE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Umpqua Health Alliance is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Umpqua Health Alliance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Member Services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 229-4842 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Member Services (541) 229-4842 Crisis Hotline (540) 440-3532 TTY/TTD (541) 440-6304 Toll-free (888) 877-6304 TTY/TTD Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information. Visit website to search a database for a list of care providers that accept Oregon Health Plan. FEES: None for referrals DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Douglas County (excluding zip codes 97441, 97467, and 97473) Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS TRANSPORTATION - MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
